concept: The novel's title and a scattering of poetic fragments are formed from actively dissolving Vietnamese brush calligraphy, sweeping across the cover like fading memories.
A close-up of an intricately carved wooden spirit mask slowly being consumed by luminous, ghostly kelp green barnacles and damp sandstone erosion.
A vast aerial view of a flooded, labyrinthine rice terrace reflecting an empty sky, completely devoid of human presence.
A minimalist, topographical cross-section of a dense jungle floor, where the root systems of an ancient banyan tree are rendered as hollow, bleeding silhouettes.
